name: Cuban Black Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried black beans (or 16 oz. can of black beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve the dip with toasted pita triangles and sliced veggies.
2. Store in the refrigerator for up to a couple of days.
3. Soak beans in water overnight, then drain.
4. Cook beans in 4 cups of water for about 1-1/2 hours or until tender; drain again.
5. Combine beans, chopped onions, vinegar, orange juice, and garlic in a blender or food processor.
6. Blend until smooth, season with salt and pepper.
7. Mix in remaining onions and place in serving bowl.
